name: Maharsh Solanki
title: Full Stack Developer | Cloud Engineer | AI Enthusiast
bio: Full Stack Developer, Cloud Engineer & AI Enthusiast. Crafting scalable full-stack applications, cloud-native APIs, and AI-driven systems on cloud. Currently pursuing B.Tech in Information Technology at Charusat University.

projects.title: FalixMovies
projects.description: Full-stack movie browsing and streaming platform deployed on AWS, capable of handling rich media and high-volume user interactions at scale. Cloud-based content pipeline using AWS S3 and PyroGram for streaming.

projects.title: AskOrg AI
projects.description: AI-powered enterprise assistant for intelligent document retrieval and extraction of actionable insights from recorded meetings. Built with a RAG pipeline using ChromaDB as the vector store, centralizing organizational knowledge into a searchable system.

projects.title: RAG API with FastAPI
projects.description: Production-ready REST API enabling natural language Q&A over user-uploaded documents using local large language models and ChromaDB vector search. Includes document ingestion, chunking, and embedding pipeline with complete developer documentation.

projects.title: ServEase
projects.description: Full-stack service marketplace connecting users with domestic help providers, featuring Firebase Auth for secure onboarding and Spring Boot REST APIs for service booking workflows. Designed with a normalized PostgreSQL schema.

projects.title: HRMS Portal
projects.description: Centralized HR management system built on the MERN stack with role-based access control, real-time attendance logging, and admin dashboards for workforce oversight. Automated employee onboarding and HR workflows.
